name: Hot & Sweet Pepper Beef Kabobs
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut beef into 1-inch cubes and each bell pepper into 16 pieces.
2. Combine teriyaki baste & glaze, onion powder, ginger, chili powder and pepper sauce; remove 1/3 cup mixture and pour over beef and peppers in a large bowl, tossing to coat.
3. Thread beef and peppers alternately on skewers, leaving space between pieces.
4. Cook skewers on grill 5 inches from hot coals 4 minutes on each side (for rare), or to desired doneness, brushing occasionally with remaining baste & glaze mixture.
Makes 4 to 6 servings.
